title: Wavin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Wavin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
